description_long: This figure represents an adult pedestrian dressed in attire reminiscent of an ancient warrior or ceremonial leader. The person wears a sleeveless tunic with decorative patterns, a long flowing cape, and a prominent feathered headdress. Gold-colored arm and leg bands, as well as a necklace, add to the ornate appearance. The individual holds a large staff with a pointed, ornate tip in one hand and a heavy mallet or hammer in the other. The figure is barefoot, and the overall posture is upright and alert, suggesting readiness or authority. The combination of historical costume and accessories makes this figure visually striking and distinct in an urban context.
description: An adult pedestrian in ornate, historical warrior attire with a feathered headdress, cape, staff, and mallet, standing upright and barefoot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full costume, feathered headdress, necklace, and both the staff and mallet held in each hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length of the staff, the profile of the headdress, and the flowing cape.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full length of the cape, the back of the headdress, and the staff extending behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the mallet in the right hand, the staff in the left, and the side profile of the costume and accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless tunic with decorative trim, long cape, feathered headdress, arm and leg bands, necklace
attribute_hairstyle: long hair tied back in a ponytail with a feathered headdress
